description:
For detailed information on how this functions for mix and match body parts. Please also see Equipping Multiple Avatars.

- This is generated by the Avatar Creator Dialog
- This handles the click to equip context menu when clicking on avatars
- Appears to effectively equip to the Root bodynode

fields.Scale: What to set the local scale of the slot this component is on to when being equipped by a user.
fields._originalParent: The slot this avatar was parented to before equipping.

methods.OnEquipConfirm: Handles when the user has confirmed they want to equip the avatar for this component.
methods.OnEquipHeldAvatar: Handles when the user has confirmed they want to equip the avatar for this component while holding it.
